title: Roman Cerdas’s CV
text:
Computer Science student focused on cybersecurity, blockchain technology, and data science.

roman.a.cerdas@gmail.com | GitHub | LinkedIn



Studying computer science full time and developing technical skills through coursework and software projects.


IT support, troubleshooting, cybersecurity fundamentals, Python, data analysis, technical documentation, Microsoft Office, and Google Workspace.



Cybersecurity, blockchain technology, data science, network security, software development, and data analytics.




September 2017 - Present Brigham Young University–Idaho

General Studies with a Computer Science focus

July 2023 - September 2024 Google Cybersecurity Certificate

Cybersecurity fundamentals, network security, Linux, SQL, Python, and security operations




Present Eagle Scout





2026 Spotify Analysis, a data science project exploring and analyzing Spotify-related data.
2026 Chain Scout, a blockchain-focused software project with a completed project demonstration.
2026 Rust Stock Portfolio Tracker, a Rust application designed to track and manage a stock portfolio.



2024 Google Cybersecurity Certificate, covering cybersecurity analysis, network monitoring, incident response, Linux, SQL, and Python.




September 2017 - Present Brigham Young University–Idaho

Full-time student
Completing coursework in computer science, cybersecurity, data science, and software development

August 2023 - October 2023 Evolve 1 EMS

EMT
Delivered fast and accurate responses in high-pressure situations
Maintained detailed documentation and patient records

November 2022 - May 2023 American Red Cross, Laguna Hills, California

Collections Specialist
Provided customer service and support in a healthcare environment
Managed data entry and documentation with high accuracy
Coordinated logistics and resolved donor concerns

November 2021 - August 2022 Care Ambulance Service, Orange County, California

EMT-B
Responded to emergency calls and supported patient care
Maintained equipment and ensured operational readiness
Collaborated with team members under pressure
